name: Status Reader
description: Read current status of tasks, projects, and team members.

functions.name: get_status
functions.description: Retrieve current status for a given entity (task, project, or team member).

functions.name: list_active
functions.description: List all active items with their current status.

name: Task Manager
description: Create, update, and close tasks in the workspace.

functions.name: create_task
functions.description: Create a new task with title, assignee, and priority.

functions.name: update_task
functions.description: Update task status, priority, or assignee.

functions.name: close_task
functions.description: Mark a task as completed or cancelled.

name: Notes Capture
description: Capture meeting notes, action items, and key decisions.

functions.name: save_note
functions.description: Save a note with optional tags and category.

functions.name: list_notes
functions.description: List recent notes filtered by date or tags.
